_readme: Every lesson learned from a real trade outcome. Claude reads this at session start and applies these before making any trade decision.

lessons.lesson: WINNER (early exit) — NSE:TATAMOTORS +0.1% in 1d. Did not reach full target (370). Early exit: Exiting swing trade early to redeploy into hot intraday momentum stocks. TATAMOTORS barely moved (+0.4%), better opportunities in OLA Electric and JTL Industries today with real catalysts.. Consider holding longer for target.
